text.title: ai-assisted-persona-building Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ai-assisted-persona-building as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Feeding only behavioral data and expecting the agent to infer motivation without interview quotes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI clusters behavioral patterns but cannot infer motivation from event data alone. Without qualitative input, JTBD statements are fabricated.

failure-mode.description: Agent merges two legitimately distinct segments because their surface language is similar.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Similar vocabulary in two user groups does not mean similar motivation. Require the agent to explicitly state cluster-separation justification before accepting merged output.

failure-mode.description: Passing only new data when updating existing personas, without including the prior persona JSON.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without the prior persona as context, the agent restarts clustering from scratch and produces inconsistent results that cannot be compared to the previous version.

failure-mode.description: Using AI personas as the sole input for major product decisions without human interview validation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI personas are a synthesis tool, not a research substitute. LLMs over-index on articulate user quotes; silent users who churn are systematically under-represented.

failure-mode.description: Accepting quantified impact claims (e.g., "saves 3 hours/week") that were not in the input data.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI fabricates specific numbers when quantified fields are requested but no measurement data was supplied. These numbers appear credible and propagate into product decisions.

failure-mode.description: Feeding user data to third-party LLMs in HIPAA/GDPR-sensitive contexts without reviewing legal basis.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Regulatory context may prohibit sending user data to external LLM providers. Verify lawful basis and consent before any data upload to cloud services.
